response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a performance by the VTuber unit FuwaMoco. 2. Detected the song title 'DEMON'S RESIDENCE' via on-screen text. 3. Identified the composer/lyricist from on-screen text: Lyrics: 海野水玉, Music: 松隈ケンタ. 4. Searched for official lyrics using the song title and composer names. 5. Found accurate lyrics for the song. 6. Segmented the video into an intro talk and the song performance. 7. Constructed the JSON object with the gathered metadata and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing an introductory talk by FuwaMoco followed by a performance of their original song 'DEMON'S RESiDENCE'.

scenes.description: The video begins with the performers, FuwaMoco, talking to the camera in a studio setting, introducing themselves and their new song.
A brief transitional pose and stage change before the performance begins.
FuwaMoco performs their original song 'DEMON'S RESiDENCE' on a virtual stage. The performance includes singing and dancing until the end of the video.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
"Buddy, where shall we go?" Slipping past the neon lights
When the bubblegum pops, let's go
Slinking through this wretched night, we run in a pack
"Better than back then, huh?" my way

"It's incomplete," wearing a collar
I'm already fed up with being a good girl (ah)

demon's residence, bite down
This city is like a wall
How do you feel? Are you crying?
Rip the chains apart
I want to keep screaming, stray dogs
Looking up at the birds flying towards the distant horizon
Is that all you do? Is that enough?
If you're going to burn, then look, burn blue

"I don't need any lectures," shaking a spray paint can
Coloring the world with graffiti
Love is just a coin toss, who are you going to bet on?
It's just full of uncertain factors, lonely

"We decided on one for the two of us"
I won't forget that day (ah)

demon's residence, a sky full of stars
That star is terribly unpleasant
How about victory? Can you taste it?
Biting the chains
I want to keep growling, stray dogs, us
Shooting down even the universe
Looking down at the abyss, the buildings shine
lol, now I am free

woah-oh-oh-oh
woah-oh-oh
woah-oh-oh-oh
woah-oh-oh

Sharing and eating our loneliness
I won't forget that day (ah)

Staring at the night, stray dogs, that's right
The monsters are the world itself
Can you escape? Can your legs move?
If you're going to run, do it now

demon's residence, stray dogs, us
Run through this city
What can you see at the end of hell?
Rip the chains apart
I want to keep screaming, stray dogs, us
This city is like a cage
How about you? Will you run with me?
Dawn is the signal, let's go",reference_lyrics_og:
